title: Swordfish Multicoloured ‘Stripey’ Eraser [Pack of 1] PVC and Phthalate Free Tablet Eraser [40336]
features: Fun, ergonomic and aesthetically designed eraser is ideal for use in the home and classroom – perfect for students and artists
Its bright and vibrant striped colour goes all the way through the 64 mm long eraser, adding a welcomed brightness to any workstation
Unique ergonomic shape provides a comfortable finger grip allowing you to use the eraser for longer periods of time without any discomfort
All Swordfish erasers erase cleanly ensuring no colour residue is left behind, with minimal crumbling reducing waste
PVC and phthalate free, the Swordfish eraser is non-toxic and latex free – ensuring its’ suitability and safety for use by young children
description: From the manufacturer Swordfish erasers are suitable for HB and softer grade pencils and are ideal for precision, a must have for all pencil cases and desks. Swordfish prides itself in producing PVC and Phthalate Free erasers, ensuring no harmful chemicals are used during the manufacturing process. Removing marks is made easier with our smudge free erasers allowing you to correct any errors. They have been designed to meet individual needs and are suited to a multitude of different papers. These erasers also erase cleanly, leaving no colour residue or waste due to minimal crumbling. Eccentric and vivacious, Swordfish's Stripey Eraser is ideal for use in the home, school and college. The 64mm long Stripey Eraser isn’t just colourful, it’s practical too. You can use the handy eraser for all your pencil erasing needs – from amending revision notes to fixing drawings and sketches, the Stripey Eraser will get the job done. Swordfish’s Stripey Eraser provides a comfortable finger grip, designed to ensure you have a pleasurable erasing experience. The unique ergonomic shape also makes the eraser suitable for use by young children. As with all our erasers, Swordfish ensures no harmful chemicals are used during the manufacturing process – this means all Swordfish erasers are non-toxic and latex-free. You can rest assured the PVC and Phthalate Free erasers are safe for use by all ages. The multi-coloured eraser keeps its’ bright and vibrant striped colour all the way through, for a welcomed brightness to any desk.
